layers.mission: Continue reviewing grant applications for the Builder Track.
layers.originalIntent: Score projects fairly while keeping private reviewer notes confidential.
layers.currentState: Five applications reviewed. Three remain. Public scoring categories are finalized.
layers.completedWork: Five of eight applications fully scored with public-facing rationales drafted.
layers.unresolvedRisks: Applicants may misunderstand low scores if the public explanations are too vague or terse.
layers.decisions: Scoring categories are locked: impact, feasibility, team, ecosystem fit.
layers.constraints: Do not expose private reviewer notes to applicants under any circumstances.
layers.nextAction: Review the remaining three applications and write public-facing explanations based on the aggregated criteria.
layers.definitionOfDone: All applications have public-facing explanations without revealing private reviewer notes.
layers.peopleWaiting: Three applicants awaiting decisions, plus the grants lead for the weekly report.

layers.mission: Hand over an active degraded-RPC incident to the next timezone without losing the timeline.
layers.originalIntent: Restore full RPC availability while keeping a clean public status page narrative.
layers.currentState: Primary RPC node is degraded at roughly forty percent error rate. Failover to the secondary node is live but rate-limited.
layers.completedWork: Failover engaged, status page updated to partial outage, root-cause hypothesis narrowed to a bad cache layer.
layers.unresolvedRisks: The secondary node may saturate under peak US traffic, which would turn a partial outage into a full one.
layers.decisions: We will not roll back the cache deploy yet; we are gathering metrics for thirty more minutes first.
layers.constraints: Do not post raw internal error logs to the public status page.
layers.nextAction: Watch secondary-node saturation during US peak and decide on the cache rollback by 18:00 UTC.
layers.definitionOfDone: Error rate is back under two percent and the status page shows fully operational.
layers.peopleWaiting: Community channel and two integration partners are watching the status page.

layers.mission: Finish the grant scoring interface so reviewers can publish decisions.
layers.originalIntent: Make reviewer decisions transparent to applicants without exposing private reviewer notes.
layers.currentState: Frontend layout is complete. Scoring aggregation logic is partially implemented and untested.
layers.completedWork: All layout components and the public score card are built and styled.
layers.unresolvedRisks: The aggregated bias display may be misread by applicants as an individual reviewer's opinion.
layers.decisions: Aggregation is the only thing applicants ever see; individual scores stay server-side.
layers.constraints: Do not expose raw private reviewer comments in any view.
layers.nextAction: Implement the aggregated score explanation component and test it against the demo dataset.
layers.definitionOfDone: Applicants can understand why a project was accepted, rejected, or asked to revise, with no private data leaked.
layers.peopleWaiting: The grants team wants this live before the next review round opens.

layers.mission: Summarize the treasury-diversification discussion for the incoming delegate ahead of the vote.
layers.originalIntent: Preserve the nuance of the debate so the next delegate votes with full context, not just the headline.
layers.currentState: Discussion ran for two weeks across the forum and two calls. A draft proposal exists but is not finalized.
layers.completedWork: Captured the three competing positions and the main objection to each.
layers.unresolvedRisks: The most-liked forum post oversimplifies the stablecoin-allocation risk, which could skew the vote.
layers.decisions: Quorum threshold for this vote was agreed at the higher tier given the treasury impact.
layers.constraints: Do not present the summary as an endorsement of any single position.
layers.nextAction: Write a neutral one-page brief covering all three positions and the open question on stablecoin allocation.
layers.definitionOfDone: The incoming delegate can articulate all three positions and the key open risk before voting.
layers.peopleWaiting: The incoming delegate and the governance facilitator.

layers.mission: Hand over an ongoing dispute between two long-time contributors to the next moderator.
layers.originalIntent: De-escalate without taking sides and without exposing private DMs shared in confidence.
layers.currentState: Both contributors have agreed to a cool-off. One has asked for a public apology, which is contested.
layers.completedWork: Separated the two threads, issued a neutral reminder of the code of conduct, logged the timeline privately.
layers.unresolvedRisks: If the public-apology demand is mishandled, it could re-ignite the conflict and pull in observers.
layers.decisions: No public statement naming individuals will be made; resolution stays in the private mediation thread.
layers.constraints: Do not share the private DMs that were disclosed to you in confidence.
layers.nextAction: Hold a short private mediation call and propose a mutual statement rather than a one-sided apology.
layers.definitionOfDone: Both contributors return to collaboration and no private DMs were ever exposed.
layers.peopleWaiting: Both contributors and the community lead.
